description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The exterior features dark vertical siding contrasted by a central section of wood paneling around the main entryway. Large, white-framed windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front entrance is accessed via a short walkway and a set of steps, flanked by a landscaped area with low shrubbery. The house includes a driveway leading up to the front, and the rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal ornamentation. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story house with dark vertical siding, large white-framed windows, and a flat roof. The entryway features wood paneling, steps, and a landscaped front area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with wood paneling, steps, driveway, and landscaped area, as well as large windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical siding, a large window, and a partial view of the interior and driveway extension.
description_view_2: Rear view with a simple facade, featuring several large windows and minimal decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, the continuation of the vertical siding, and a glimpse of the front landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with wood paneling, steps, and a small landscaped area; no porch or overhang.
